name: Dozzle
description: Real-time Docker container log viewer in the browser. Tail, search, and filter logs across every container on this host.
author: Crow

install_consent_messages.en: Dozzle requires read-only access to the Docker socket (/var/run/docker.sock) so it can list containers and stream their logs in your browser. This is a significant privilege: container logs often contain stack traces, connection strings, and occasionally secrets that were accidentally logged. Crow enforces read-only Docker socket (no writes, no container control). Dozzle binds to 127.0.0.1 only — never expose its port publicly without authentication enabled.
install_consent_messages.es: Dozzle necesita acceso de solo lectura al socket de Docker (/var/run/docker.sock) para listar contenedores y transmitir sus logs en tu navegador. Es un privilegio significativo: los logs de contenedores suelen incluir trazas, cadenas de conexión y, a veces, secretos registrados por error. Crow impone solo lectura en el socket de Docker (sin escrituras ni control de contenedores). Dozzle se vincula solo a 127.0.0.1 — nunca expongas su puerto públicamente sin autenticación.

notes: Log viewer is primarily a UI; MCP exposes a lightweight status + link tool. For automated log analysis, use Netdata's log collection or shell into the target container directly. Docker socket mounted read-only.
